summary: Tested principal dashboard (School Dashboard) - Fixed critical bug where dashboard was using wrong localStorage key for token. All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend now displays REAL API data instead of fallback mock data.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: SchoolDashboardContent.jsx was using localStorage.getItem('token') instead of localStorage.getItem('nassaq_token') - causing 401 errors and fallback to mock data
FIXED: Same issue in UserDetailsPage.jsx, UsersManagement.jsx, and ForcePasswordChange.jsx
Dashboard API /api/school/dashboard returns correct data structure with metrics, attendance, interventions, and alerts
Dashboard correctly shows real data: 12 students, 6 teachers, 0 classes, 83% attendance
All 6 quick action buttons work correctly (Add Student, Add Teacher, Create Class, Create Schedule, View Sessions, Send Notification)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all components working with real API data)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing principal account and school data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Principal dashboard is now working correctly with real API data. The localStorage key for token is 'nassaq_token' (not 'token'). Dashboard shows: 12 students, 6 teachers, 0 classes, 83% attendance. All quick actions work. The school has limited data - only 12 students and 6 teachers in the database.

returns.metrics: totalStudents, totalTeachers, totalClasses, todaySessions, attendanceRate, waitingSubstitute

dashboard_ui.attendance_summary: PASSED - Shows student and teacher attendance percentages

bug_fixed.description: Dashboard was showing fallback mock data (1245 students) instead of real API data (12 students)
bug_fixed.root_cause: localStorage key mismatch - component used 'token' but AuthContext stores as 'nassaq_token'
bug_fixed.verification: Dashboard now shows real data: 12 students, 6 teachers, 0 classes
